---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

If this is a usage question rather than a reproducible bug, use the support
surface in [`SUPPORT.md`](../../SUPPORT.md) instead.

## Reproduction Steps
```python
# Minimal code to reproduce the bug
import voiage
# ...
```

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened, including any error messages or unexpected output.

## Environment
- **OS**: [e.g. macOS 14.0, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Python version**: [e.g. 3.11.5]
- **voiage version**: [e.g. 0.2.0]
- **Installation method**: [e.g. pip, from source]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here. If applicable, attach data files that trigger the bug.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for existing issues
- [ ] I have included a minimal reproduction example
- [ ] I have provided my environment details
- [ ] I can reproduce this bug with the latest version
